About: It is about a subgroup of the South Korean boy band SS501.

It has a special album titled 'ESTRENO'.
It has a second mini album 'Eternal 0'.
It has a second mini album 'Eternal 1'.
It has a single titled Unison Volume 1.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the absence of SS501 members, Kim Hyun-joong and Park Jung-min.
It is characterized by being a rebranding of the group under CI Entertainment.
It is characterized by being temporarily put on hiatus in 2017.
It is characterized by the transcribed pronunciation of SS501, altered to represent the group's member loss.
It is characterized by being a nod to SS501's Official fanclub, Triple S.
HeldIn: It was held in Abu Dhabi.
HeldOn: It was held on March 19 and 20, 2016.
It was held on February 15 at 8pm KST.
IsA: It is a subgroup of the South Korean boy band SS501.

It is known as Double S 301.
KnownFor: It is known for the EP "UR Man."
It is known for the song "내 머리가 나빠서" (Because I'm Stupid).
It is known for the song "U R Man".
It is known for the album Eternal 5.
It is known for the special album 'ESTRENO'.
It is known for the mini albums 'Eternal 0' and 'Eternal 1'.
It is known for the single Unison Volume 1.
MemberOf: It is a member of SS501.
OccurredAt: It occurred at Art Hall of Lotte Card Art Center.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the absence of SS501 members, Kim Hyun-joong and Park Jung-min.
It occurred during their military enlistments.
It occurred during mandatory military service.
It occurred during the group's 11th anniversary.
It occurred during the group's 12th anniversary.
PartOf: It is part of the South Korean boy band SS501.
PublishedAs: It was published as 'SS501 Special Project Group'.
PublishedBy: It was published by DSP Media.
It was published by CI Entertainment.
It was published by B2M Entertainment.
UsedAs: It is used as a trio sub-unit.
UsedFor: It is used for the Grease musical.
It is used for the Boys Over Flowers series.
It is used for the Boys Over Flowers soundtrack.
It is used for a comeback.
It is used for a concert.
It is used for a showcase.
